name: Cataclysm
text:
Shatter their world.

Earnable after purchasing the CATACLYSM Tavern Pass.

name: Wyrmrest
text:
Hold your last stand here.

Acquired from winning five games in Ranked Play, April 2026.

name: Worldbreaker
text:
Inevitable, indomitable.

Obtainable within Darkmoon Faire Treasures.

name: Merithra
text:
Show them your dreams are worth defending.

Purchasable when available in the shop.

name: Magmaw
text:
Burn it all down.

Earnable after purchasing the CATACLYSM Tavern Pass.

name: Nefarius
text:
Let the games begin.

Purchasable when available in the shop.

name: Cataclysmic Brawler
text:
The world shattered. The win streak didn't. Cheers!

Acquired by earning the "CATACLYSM Pre-Release Pro" achievement.

name: Legend of the Scarab
text:
A true Legend becomes one with the Scarab.

Acquired from achieving Legend Rank in Ranked Play during the Year of the Scarab.

name: Benedictus
text:
No Light, only power.

Purchasable when available in the shop.
